problem id: a4f4fb0c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10011011 -> 00110010
  00100000 -> 01000001
  11100100 -> 11001111
  01010101 -> 10101000
  11001011 -> 10010000
  00100001 -> 01000011
  10001010 -> 00010000
  00000110 -> 00001100
  11011000 -> 10110110
  00010100 -> 00101000

query: 10110100
predicted answer: 01101101
